title: Lead SEO Specialist at Rivigo South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Rivigo South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled SEO Specialist looking for your next big career move? Rivigo South Asia Partners in Jabalpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Rivigo South Asia Partners:
Rivigo South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rivigo South Asia Partners!
